subject: Add DCAE cleanup job, update CBS version
commit_message:
Add DCAE cleanup job, update CBS version

Also fix CBS and policy handler filebeat loggging.
Shorten names in CBS to remain < 64 with 10-char
release name.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1729
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1317
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1747
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1749
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1750
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflucas@research.att.com>
Change-Id: I5a727e3c9502205bc727439ed70728238d59d74e

entries.message:

Patch Set 1:

I get a 404 when I try access the "full results" link in the message from the JobDeployer.  I believe the root cause of the failure is the MSB failure.   The DCAE bootstrap container waits for MSB to become ready.   If MSB never becomes ready, the bootstrap doesn't run and some DCAE components aren't deployed.  The DCAE healthcheck will fail as a result.

My local deployment worked--I provided my local results in an earlier comment.

Patch Set 1:

@Jack, sometimes the page generation takes times (less than 15min) so you get a 404. In my side it works.

the issue is that dcae bootstrap waits for MSB but MSB is broken... (see AAI-2596).
Issue resolution is on its way

Patch Set 1:

@Sylvain,
Will we need to re-run the job once MSB is fixed?

I can see the results page today.  It's very informative.

Patch Set 1:

I’ll launch the redeployment yes :-)
Change has been successfully merged by Mike Elliott
